display.name: martin + stahlregen - martin in da mash 12
display.author: martin + stahlregen

annotation.technical_notes: A highly minimalist preset featuring a single parametric custom_wave that traces elegant, sweeping amber loops against a pure black void. The wave's scale and spatial translation are modulated by the bass frequencies of the synthetic test signal, while high-frequency jitter along the curve reflects mid-to-treble activity. With decay set to maximum, the frame remains entirely free of persistent trails or feedback artifacts.
